(b) Replace the hardcoded `_AUTO_PROCEED_SECTION_ORDER` with a pack-aware resolver that returns `pack_paper_sections(pack)` when declared, falling back to IMRAD. Both fixes share the same `_active_pack_name(root)` helper that already exists in `synthesize.py:776`. |

**Overall completeness state:** The engineering pack is well-built at the protocol + tool layer (7 protocols, 3 tools, working detector, router entries) and is correctly wired through the only pack-aware schema hook the plugin API exposes ÔÇö `paper_sections`. End-to-end PDF compilation respects the non-IMRAD section order. But the integration story falls apart for every deliverable downstream of `paper.md`: the dashboard (story + explore), slides, poster, and reviewer scaffold are all hardcoded to either IMRAD or to qualitative/humanities branches, with no extensibility hook for an engineering project. The drafter_loop has the right abstraction (`expected_sections`) but no caller is passing the pack's declared sections, and the autopilot section iterator is itself hardcoded to IMRAD. The pack therefore "passes" only for `literature_gate` and `paper_pdf`; the remaining 6 subsystems need work before v2.0.0, with the highest leverage being a `PackRegistration.personas` field + a `dashboard_renderer` hook + wiring `expected_sections` through the three drafter_loop call sites (the last is a one-line fix per call site).
